description: Move files and directories to the recycle bin / Trash. Also lists and empties the trash.

platform.value_on_windows: Windows has no built-in recycle-bin CLI; Remove-Item deletes permanently.
platform.value_on_unix: One binary matching trash-cli/macos-trash semantics, no Python/Node runtime required.

prefer_default_when: permanent unrecoverable delete — use rm or shred

glob_expansion.quoting: quoted args not expanded (effective from cmd; PowerShell strips quotes)

options.description: Structured JSON metadata for AI agents
Show what is currently in the recycle bin / Trash.
Permanently empty the recycle bin / Trash (prompts unless --yes or non-interactive).
Skip confirmation when emptying the trash.
Coloured output: auto (default when omitted), always, or never

exit_codes.description: Success (a closed downstream pipe, e.g. | head -1, also exits 0 — not an error)
--empty cancelled: declined at the prompt, or refused without --yes when not interactive
Usage error: unknown flag, --list/--empty misuse, empty/duplicate path, no paths
One or more paths failed (missing path, permission denied), or some items could not be emptied — like rm
Backend failure: OS recycle-bin API error

io.stdout: Plain mode: nothing on success (summary to stderr); --list: the listing; --json: a JSON envelope.

examples.description: Send a file to the recycle bin / Trash
Trash multiple paths (a file and a directory)
